name: Seal leakage
symptom: visible leakage and loss of containment

name: Cavitation
cause: low suction pressure or blocked strainer

name: Belt damage
cause: foreign object impact or material carryback
symptom: visible belt tears or splice damage

name: Actuator failure
cause: air supply issue or limit switch fault

name: Stem leakage
cause: packing wear or gland adjustment issue

name: High discharge temperature
cause: cooler fouling or low oil level

name: Oil carryover
cause: separator element saturation or high oil level

name: Belt slippage
cause: low belt tension or worn belt
